entities.name: PIGEON PEA

entities.name: BRUCHIDS

entities.description: Plant used to create botanical powder extracts for insect control

entities.description: Extracts made with solvent acetone used as an alternative to synthetic insecticides

entities.name: ADULT MORTALITY

entities.name: ADULT EMERGENCE
entities.description: The rate at which adult insects emerge from the crop

entities.name: SEMI-ARID AREAS
entities.description: Environmental regions where pulses are stored and affected by pests

entities.name: SYNTHETIC INSECTICIDES
entities.description: Hazardous chemical agents used for pest control

entities.description: The institution where the entomology research and bioassays were conducted
